name: Find it! festival in the Hotel
short_description: We are holding the Find it! festival in the hotel! Walk around the rooms and search for hidden items. In rooms filled with many things, can you find the items you're looking for? Enjoy 10 different themed rooms.
detailed_description:
Find the Globe!
... Found it quickly? Then next, find the Cupcake!

This game is a 3D hidden object game where you walk around a hotel room looking for hidden items.
It may be easy at first, but the decorations increase and it becomes more difficult as you move to the back rooms. Can you find all the items? Enjoy the room decorations and give it a try!

Features

  • First-person perspective
  • Simple controls
  • Lots of decorations
  • 10 rooms with different themes
  • Auto-save
  • Random room changes every reset
  • Yellow Duck

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Italian, Traditional Chinese
